name: Western Leadbank CSI 500 Equal Weight Index Graded Securities Fund
summary: Western Leadbank CSI 500 Equal Weight Index Graded Securities Fund is a fund managed by Western Leadbank that tracks the CSI 500 Equal Weight Index using a graded securities structure. The fund invests in the 500 small and medium-sized A-shares listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges, with each company having equal weighting.
